svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="y-uKtFNfZFEA8ZQEyfH4"> <mxGraphModel dx="1012" dy="565" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-5" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h1 data-section-id="1vmtpbm" data-start="0" data-end="50">Terraform Init — What Happens Behind the Scenes?</h1><br><p data-start="52" data-end="273"><code data-start="52" data-end="68"><b>terraform init</b></code> is the first command you run in a Terraform project. It prepares the working directory by configuring the backend, downloading required providers and modules, and setting up Terraform's local environment.</p><blockquote data-start="275" data-end="427"><p data-start="277" data-end="427"><strong data-start="277" data-end="291">Important:</strong> <code data-start="292" data-end="308">terraform init</code> does <strong data-start="314" data-end="321">not</strong> create, modify, or delete any infrastructure. It only prepares Terraform to work with your configuration.</p></blockquote>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="188" width="731" x="99" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-7" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h1 data-section-id="1mzmmtt" data-start="601" data-end="645"><span role="text">What Happens When We Run <code data-start="628" data-end="644">terraform init</code>?</span></h1><h2 data-section-id="1b13ub2" data-start="647" data-end="675">1. Backend Initialization</h2><p data-start="677" data-end="751">Terraform first checks whether a backend is configured and initializes it.</p><h3 data-section-id="z5q4pk" data-start="753" data-end="764">Purpose</h3><p data-start="765" data-end="856">The backend determines where the Terraform state file (<code data-start="820" data-end="839">terraform.tfstate</code>) will be stored.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="277" width="719" x="102" y="227" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-9" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="13kuw9j" data-start="1088" data-end="1111">What Terraform Does</h3><ul data-start="1113" data-end="1250"><li data-section-id="1bdy983" data-start="1113" data-end="1143">Reads backend configuration.<br></li><li data-section-id="1nuit4i" data-start="1144" data-end="1173">Validates backend settings.<br></li><li data-section-id="5giss4" data-start="1174" data-end="1213">Verifies connectivity to the backend.<br></li><li data-section-id="1myprf2" data-start="1214" data-end="1250">Configures state storage location.</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="123" width="630.97" x="95" y="419" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-10" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="112" width="324" x="383.0032055664062" y="419.0026909930889" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-11" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="1e1kslh" data-start="1364" data-end="1394">2. Provider Plugin Download</h2><p data-start="1396" data-end="1482">Terraform identifies all required providers from the configuration and downloads them.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="71" width="613" x="91" y="545" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-12" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="13kuw9j" data-start="1633" data-end="1656">What Terraform Does</h3><ul data-start="1658" data-end="1800"><li data-section-id="1eo5mne" data-start="1658" data-end="1688">Reads provider requirements.</li><li data-section-id="11c8n6i" data-start="1689" data-end="1726">Connects to the Terraform Registry.</li><li data-section-id="yvm70w" data-start="1727" data-end="1769">Downloads the matching provider version.<br></li><li data-section-id="6jbpd6" data-start="1770" data-end="1800">Stores the provider locally.</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="122" width="282" x="91" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-13" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="298" x="406.0047440279446" y="620.0004441481369" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-14" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="o9306u" data-start="2029" data-end="2050">3. Module Download</h2><p data-start="2052" data-end="2134">If the configuration uses modules, Terraform downloads them during initialization.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="610" x="99" y="759" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-15" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="13kuw9j" data-start="2217" data-end="2240">What Terraform Does</h3><ul data-start="2242" data-end="2388"><li data-section-id="1vypru0" data-start="2242" data-end="2362">Downloads modules from:<br><ul data-start="2270" data-end="2362"><li data-section-id="wewr2z" data-start="2270" data-end="2290">Terraform Registry<br></li><li data-section-id="1xdrp7x" data-start="2293" data-end="2301">GitHub<br></li><li data-section-id="1ludfz5" data-start="2304" data-end="2326">Private repositories<br></li><li data-section-id="1h9iiph" data-start="2329" data-end="2362">Local sources (validation only)<br></li></ul></li><li data-section-id="5ghgm3" data-start="2363" data-end="2388">Stores modules locally.</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="133" width="492.11" x="95" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-16" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="109" width="204" x="427.99935941256007" y="851.9989056865984" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="<h2 data-section-id="14rsn84" data-start="2547" data-end="2582">4. Dependency Lock File Creation</h2><p data-start="2584" data-end="2676">Terraform creates or updates a lock file that records exact provider versions and checksums.</p><h3 data-section-id="1dfxrlb" data-start="2678" data-end="2696">Generated File</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2698" data-end="2729"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>.terraform.lock.hcl</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-17"> <mxCell parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="125" width="512" x="99" y="975" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-18" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="z5q4pk" data-start="2731" data-end="2742">Purpose</h3><ul data-start="2744" data-end="2872"><li data-section-id="3gnxtz" data-start="2744" data-end="2783">Ensures consistent provider versions.<br></li><li data-section-id="z7rarg" data-start="2784" data-end="2824">Prevents unexpected provider upgrades.<br></li><li data-section-id="47njw4" data-start="2825" data-end="2872">Improves reproducibility across environments.</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="87.99" width="372" x="96" y="1100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-20" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="su6dof" data-start="2981" data-end="3021"><span role="text">5. Creation of <code data-start="2999" data-end="3011">.terraform</code> Directory</span></h2><p data-start="3023" data-end="3096">Terraform creates a hidden directory to store local project dependencies.</p><h3 data-section-id="13hb7sj" data-start="3098" data-end="3111">Structure</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="3113" data-end="3186"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>.terraform/</span><br><span>├── providers/</span><br><span>├── modules/</span><br><span>└── terraform.tfstate</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="164" width="413" x="95" y="1193" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-22" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="z5q4pk" data-start="3188" data-end="3199">Purpose</h3><p data-start="3201" data-end="3225">This directory contains:</p><ul data-start="3227" data-end="3300"><li data-section-id="91mhnz" data-start="3227" data-end="3249">Downloaded providers<br></li><li data-section-id="1h3f7tg" data-start="3250" data-end="3270">Downloaded modules<br></li><li data-section-id="1c5fn1g" data-start="3271" data-end="3300">Internal Terraform metadata</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="197.35" x="518" y="1231" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="<h1 data-section-id="hvlibx" data-start="4699" data-end="4717">One-Line Summary</h1><blockquote data-start="4719" data-end="4979" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node=""><p data-start="4721" data-end="4979" data-is-last-node=""><strong data-start="4721" data-end="4979" data-is-last-node=""><font style="font-size: 17px;"><i><code data-start="4723" data-end="4739" style="">terraform init</code> prepares the Terraform working directory by initializing the backend, downloading providers and modules, creating the <code data-start="4858" data-end="4870" style="">.terraform</code> directory, and generating the <code data-start="4901" data-end="4922" style="">.terraform.lock.hcl</code> file. It does not create any infrastructure resources.</i></font></strong></p></blockquote>" id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-23"> <mxCell parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="205" width="647" x="96" y="1396" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 729px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.h1: Terraform Init — What Happens Behind the Scenes?
div.p: terraform init is the first command you run in a Terraform project. It prepares the working directory by configuring the backend, downloading required providers and modules, and setting up Terraform's local environment.

blockquote.p: Important: terraform init does not create, modify, or delete any infrastructure. It only prepares Terraform to work with your configuration.

switch.text: Terraform Init — What Happens Behind the Scenes?...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 717px; height: 1px; padding-top: 186px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

h1.span: What Happens When We Run terraform init?

div.p: Terraform first checks whether a backend is configured and initializes it.
The backend determines where the Terraform state file (terraform.tfstate) will be stored.

switch.text: What Happens When We Run terraform init?...

div.p: Terraform identifies all required providers from the configuration and downloads them.

div.p: If the configuration uses modules, Terraform downloads them during initialization.

ul.li:
Downloads modules from:
Terraform Registry
GitHub
Private repositories
Local sources (validation only)

font.i: terraform init prepares the Terraform working directory by initializing the backend, downloading providers and modules, creating the .terraform directory, and generating the .terraform.lock.hcl file. It does not create any infrastructure resources.
